lesson.title: See the ball. See your guy.
lesson.body_md:
## You can't only guard your guy

Defense is a team. When a teammate gets beat, you have to help. The trick is helping without leaving your guy wide open.

```takeaway
Golden rule: see the ball. See your guy. Never stare at one.
```

## Where to stand

Imagine a line from the ball to the rim. Stand between your guy and that line.

- Your guy near the ball? Be one arm-length off.
- Your guy across the floor? Sit deep, almost in the paint.

```tip
The farther your guy is from the ball, the deeper you can help.
```

## Two ways to help

### 1) Stunt and recover
Your teammate got a half-step beat. Take **one** hard step at the ball, hands out, then sprint back. You scared the driver for a second.

### 2) Full rotate
The drive is gone. Layup coming. You commit, take the charge or contest. Someone else has to grab your guy.

## Read it fast

```reveal
Q: Your teammate got a half-step beat by the driver. What do you do?
A: Stunt and recover. One step at the ball, then back to your guy. Buys your teammate a second.
```

```reveal
Q: The driver blew by your teammate clean. Layup is coming. What do you do?
A: Full rotate. Stop the layup. Trust your team to find your guy.
```

## Test yourself

```quiz
Q: Your guy is in the weak-side corner. The ball is at the top. Where do you stand?
- Glued to your guy in the corner ✗
- Way off, almost in the paint ✓
- On the free-throw line ✗
Why: Far from the ball = deep help. You'll have time to recover if the ball is skipped to your guy.
```

```quiz
Q: A drive is coming at you and there's no help behind you. What do you do?
- Gamble for the steal ✗
- Hold the line, body up ✓
- Leave to double the ball ✗
Why: Last line of defense. No gamble. Stay big, stay low, take the charge if you can.
```

## Watch out for

```mistake
Ball watching. You stare at the ball. Your guy cuts behind you for a layup.
Fix: pivot your eyes — ball, man, ball, man.
```

```mistake
Leaving too early on a fake. The ball gets swung and your guy buries a three.
Fix: wait for the actual drive, not the threat.
```

## Talk on defense

Three calls every defender needs:

- **"Ball!"** — I have the ball.
- **"Help!"** — I've got your back.
- **"Switch!"** — Trade guys, now.

```takeaway
Be one pass away with your eyes, two passes away with your feet.
```

Now try it in practice.
